Document:
# Faction War System
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Faction_War"]
The Wasteland is defined by conflict. The Faction War system provides a formal framework for organized warfare between player factions.
## War-Capable Factions
Only factions with the infrastructure and numbers to sustain organized combat can declare war:
[bold][color=#a4885c]New California Republic (NCR)[/color][/bold] — Rangers are aliased to NCR automatically
[bold][color=#a4885c]Brotherhood of Steel[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Caesar's Legion[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Townsfolk[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Outlaws (Player Raiders)[/color][/bold]
## War Timeline
Every war follows a strict four-phase cycle:
[bold][color=#a4885c]Phase 1: Round-Start Cooldown[/color][/bold] [color=#cccccc]Duration: 30 minutes[/color] War declarations are locked. Factions use this time to set up and staff positions.
[bold][color=#ffb000]Phase 2: Pending Phase[/color][/bold] [color=#cccccc]Duration: 5 minutes[/color] Preparation window after declaration. Members use [bold]/warjoin[/bold] to opt in.
[bold][color=#cc3333]Phase 3: Active War[/color][/bold] [color=#cccccc]Duration: 30 minutes[/color] Combat is authorized between participating factions. Auto-ceasefire triggers after 30 minutes.
[bold][color=#888888]Phase 4: Post-War Cooldown[/color][/bold] [color=#cccccc]Duration: 10 minutes[/color] Both factions are locked from new declarations. Hostilities cease.
## Player Commands
[bold][color=#a4885c]Command[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Description[/color][/bold]
[bold]/war <faction> <reason>[/bold]
Declare war. Reason (casus belli) must be 5+ words. Only usable by highest-ranking online member.
[bold]/warjoin[/bold]
Join a pending war during the 5-minute preparation phase. Any member of the involved faction can use this.
[bold]/ceasefire <faction>[/bold]
End an active war early by mutual agreement. Only usable by highest-ranking online member.
## Admin Commands
[bold][color=#a4885c]Command[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Description[/color][/bold]
[bold]/warend <aggressor> <target>[/bold]
Force-end a war immediately.
[bold]/forcewar <aggressor> <target> [reason][/bold]
Force-start a war, bypassing cooldowns and rank checks.
## Rules of Engagement
[bold]One war per faction at a time.[/bold] You cannot fight two wars simultaneously.
[bold]Only the highest-ranking online member may declare or ceasefire.[/bold] Rank is determined by job weight.
[bold]Casus belli is mandatory.[/bold] The reason must be at least 5 words.
[bold]Auto-ceasefire after 30 minutes.[/bold] Wars do not run indefinitely.
[bold]Wars are broadcast server-wide.[/bold] All players are notified when a war begins and ends.
